title: Gauntlet Results
description: Schema for results.json files produced by a Gauntlet test suite run.

version.description: Schema version number for the results format.

suite.description: Name of the test suite that produced these results.

commit.description: Git commit SHA at the time of the run.

duration_ms.description: Total wall-clock duration of the entire run in milliseconds.

budget_ms.description: Time budget in milliseconds that was configured for the run.

mode.description: Execution mode used for the run (e.g. strict, lenient).

egress_blocked.description: Whether network egress was blocked during the run.

passed.description: Number of scenarios that passed all assertions.

failed.description: Number of scenarios that failed one or more assertions.

skipped_budget.description: Number of scenarios skipped because the time budget was exceeded.

error.description: Number of scenarios that encountered an unexpected error.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of this scenario in milliseconds.

assertions.description: Results of individual assertions for this scenario.

error.description: Error message if the scenario outcome is error.
